name: Cocoa Brownie Cookie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Oil the bottom of a 9-inch square pan.
3. Place egg whites in a large bowl.
4. Beat until slightly frothy.
5. Add oil, yogurt and vanilla; mix well.
6. Add sugar and cocoa; mix well.
7. Add flour and salt; mix until blended.
8. Pour into the prepared pan.
9. Bake at 360 degrees for 26-28 minutes.
10. Avoid over baking.
11. Dust with confectioners sugar.
